title: The Open-Closed Principle in Software Design

questions.sentence: The Open Closed Principle OCP is one of the five SOLID principles of object oriented design but it applies equally to functional front end development
It states that software entities such as modules classes or functions should be open for extension but closed for modification
This means you should be able to add new functionality to a component without changing its existing code
In React or Vue this is often achieved through high level patterns like Composition or Render Props
Following the OCP reduces the risk of introducing bugs when adding new features making your codebase more robust and stable over time
